services.name: 运营指数与人力需求趋势分析
services.description: 趋势分析是一种相对直接的定量需求预测技术，它利用运营指数（即销售水平）与组织所需员工数量（劳动力需求）之间的历史关系来预测未来需求。

services.name: 资产负债表查询

services.name: 金融分析智能推荐

symbol.description: The name of the equity of your choice. For example: symbol=IBM .

interval.description: Time interval between two consecutive data points in the time series. The following values are supported: 1min, 5min, 15min, 30min, 60min.

fulldata.description: By default, fulldata=False. Strings compact and full are accepted with the following specifications: 'False' returns only the latest 100 data points in the intraday time series; 'True' returns trailing 30 days of the most recent intraday data if the month parameter (see above) is not specified, or the full intraday data for a specific month in history if the month parameter is specified. 'False' is recommended if you would like to reduce the data size of each API call.

apikey.description: API key used to access this information.

interval.description: By default, interval=monthly. Strings daily, weekly, and monthly are accepted.

if_include.description: The if_include parameter decides whether to generate an index removing specified exchanges, or only including the few that you require. True - if you want the ticker to be calculated using only the exchanges sent as query parameter; False - if you want the price to be calculated using all exchanges, but the ones sent as query parameter.

symbol.description: ETH where is valid ISO currency (ex. ETHUSD).

services.name: 获取标的物技术指标
services.description: 为指定的股票或货币对提供技术指标API，这些指标基于底层的时间序列股票API和外汇数据计算得出。所有指标均使用经过调整的时间序列数据计算，以消除历史拆股和分红事件对价格和成交量造成的人为扰动。

indicator_symbol.description: The symbol of the technical indicator you inquire.

interval.description: Time interval between two consecutive data points in the time series. The following values are supported: hourly, daily, weekly, monthly.

symbol.description: The name of the ticker of your choice. For example: symbol=IBM.

series_type.description: The desired price type in the time series. Four types are supported: close, open, high, low.

apikey.description: API-KEY required to access this information.

services.name: 获取公司概览与关键指标

symbol.description: The symbol of the ticker of your choice. For example: symbol=IBM.

apikey.description: API-KEY required to access this information.

services.name: 全球市场新闻与情绪数据服务
services.description: 该API提供来自全球众多权威新闻机构的实时及历史市场新闻与情绪数据，覆盖股票、加密货币、外汇等资产类别，并广泛涉及财政政策、并购、首次公开募股等多种主题。

tickers.description: The stock/crypto/forex symbols of your choice. For example: 'tickers=IBM' will filter for articles that mention the IBM ticker; tickers=COIN,CRYPTO:BTC,FOREX:USD will filter for articles that simultaneously mention Coinbase (COIN), Bitcoin (CRYPTO:BTC), and US Dollar (FOREX:USD) in their content.

topics.description: The news topics of your choice. For example: topics=technology will filter for articles that write about the technology sector; 'topics=technology,ipo' will filter for articles that simultaneously cover technology and IPO in their content.

time_from.description: Articles published after this time would be searched.

time_to.description: Articles published before this time would be searched.

apikey.description: API-KEY required to access this information.

services.name: 获取专辑信息
services.description: 获取Spotify目录中单个专辑的详细信息。

market.description:
An [ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-1_alpha-2). If a country code is specified, only content that is available in that market will be returned.
If a valid user access token is specified in the request header, the country associated with the user account will take priority over this parameter.
_**Note**: If neither market or user country are provided, the content is considered unavailable for the client._
Users can view the country that is associated with their account in the [account settings](https://www.spotify.com/se/account/overview/).

services.name: 获取专辑曲目信息
services.description: 获取专辑曲目的Spotify目录信息。可使用可选参数限制返回的曲目数量。

market.description:
An [ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-1_alpha-2). If a country code is specified, only content that is available in that market will be returned.
If a valid user access token is specified in the request header, the country associated with the user account will take priority over this parameter.
_**Note**: If neither market or user country are provided, the content is considered unavailable for the client._
Users can view the country that is associated with their account in the [account settings](https://www.spotify.com/se/account/overview/).

limit.description: The maximum number of items to return. Default: 20. Minimum: 1. Maximum: 50.

offset.description: The index of the first item to return. Default: 0 (the first item). Use with limit to get the next set of items.

services.name: 获取当前播放状态
services.description: 获取用户当前的播放状态信息，包括正在播放的曲目或剧集、播放进度以及活跃设备。

market.description:
An [ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-1_alpha-2). If a country code is specified, only content that is available in that market will be returned.
If a valid user access token is specified in the request header, the country associated with the user account will take priority over this parameter.
_**Note**: If neither market or user country are provided, the content is considered unavailable for the client._
Users can view the country that is associated with their account in the [account settings](https://www.spotify.com/se/account/overview/).

additional_types.description:
A comma-separated list of item types that your client supports besides the default `track` type. Valid types are: `track` and `episode`.
_**Note**: This parameter was introduced to allow existing clients to maintain their current behaviour and might be deprecated in the future._
In addition to providing this parameter, make sure that your client properly handles cases of new types in the future by checking against the `type` field of each object.

services.name: 获取指定艺术家信息

services.name: 获取用户偏好歌手或曲目

type.description: The type of entity to return. Valid values: `artists` or `tracks`

time_range.description: Over what time frame the affinities are computed. Valid values: `long_term` (calculated from several years of data and including all new data as it becomes available), `medium_term` (approximately last 6 months), `short_term` (approximately last 4 weeks). Default: `medium_term`

limit.description: The maximum number of items to return. Default: 20. Minimum: 1. Maximum: 50.

offset.description: The index of the first item to return. Default: 0 (the first item). Use with limit to get the next set of items.

Valid values are:
- `album`
- `single`
- `appears_on`
- `compilation`
For example: `include_groups=album,single`.

market.description:
An [ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-1_alpha-2). If a country code is specified, only content that is available in that market will be returned.
If a valid user access token is specified in the request header, the country associated with the user account will take priority over this parameter.
_**Note**: If neither market or user country are provided, the content is considered unavailable for the client._
Users can view the country that is associated with their account in the [account settings](https://www.spotify.com/se/account/overview/).

fields.description:
Filters for the query: a comma-separated list of the fields to return. If omitted, all fields are returned. For example, to get just the total number of items and the request limit:
`fields=total,limit`
A dot separator can be used to specify non-reoccurring fields, while parentheses can be used to specify reoccurring fields within objects. For example, to get just the added date and user ID of the adder:
`fields=items(added_at,added_by.id)`
Use multiple parentheses to drill down into nested objects, for example:
`fields=items(track(name,href,album(name,href)))`
Fields can be excluded by prefixing them with an exclamation mark, for example:
`fields=items.track.album(!external_urls,images)`

limit.description: The maximum number of items to return. Default: 20. Minimum: 1. Maximum: 50.

offset.description: The index of the first item to return. Default: 0 (the first item). Use with limit to get the next set of items.

additional_types.description:
A comma-separated list of item types that your client supports besides the default `track` type. Valid types are: `track` and `episode`.
_**Note**: This parameter was introduced to allow existing clients to maintain their current behaviour and might be deprecated in the future._
In addition to providing this parameter, make sure that your client properly handles cases of new types in the future by checking against the `type` field of each object.

services.name: 添加播放列表曲目
services.description: 向用户的播放列表添加一个或多个项目

position.description: The position to insert the items, a zero-based index. For example, to insert the items in the first position: `position=0`; to insert the items in the third position: `position=2`. If omitted, the items will be appended to the playlist. Items are added in the order they are listed in the query string or request body.

uris.description:
A comma-separated list of [Spotify URIs](/documentation/web-api/#spotify-uris-and-ids) to add, can be track or episode URIs. For example:
`uris=spotify:track:4iV5W9uYEdYUVa79Axb7Rh, spotify:track:1301WleyT98MSxVHPZCA6M, spotify:episode:512ojhOuo1ktJprKbVcKyQ`
A maximum of 100 items can be added in one request.
_**Note**: it is likely that passing a large number of item URIs as a query parameter will exceed the maximum length of the request URI. When adding a large number of items, it is recommended to pass them in the request body, see below._

text.description: Place name prefix to search for.

language.description: The language the place names. Available languages are: en(English),es(Spanish),fr(French),de(German),pl(Polish),cs(Czech).

services.name: 三十日平均天气统计查询
services.description: 获取指定地点未来30天的长期平均天气数据（气候常态值）。可通过GPS坐标或从地点接口获取的place_id来定义位置。

place_id.description: Identifier of a place. To obtain the place_id for the location you want, please use Location endpoints. Alternatively, you can specify the location by parameters lat and lon.

lat.description: Latitude in format 12N, 12.3N, 12.3, or 13S, 13.2S, -13.4,Alternatively, you can specify the location by parameter place_id.

lon.description: Longitude in format 12E, 12.3E, 12.3, or 13W, 13.2W, -13.4,Alternatively, you can specify the location by parameter place_id.

units.description: Unit system to be used. The available values are:auto(Select the system automatically, based on the forecast location.),metric(Metric (SI) units (°C, mm/h, m/s, cm, km, hPa)),us(Imperial units (°F, in/h, mph, in, mi, inHg)),uk(Same as metric, except that visibility is in miles and wind speeds are in mph), ca( Same as metric, except that wind speeds are in km/h and pressure is in kPa.)

services.name: 最近地点查询

language.description: The language the place names. Available languages are: en(English),es(Spanish),fr(French),de(German),pl(Polish),cs(Czech).

services.name: 人工智能21天全球天气预报
services.description: 提供未来21天的每日天气预报。全球数据基于我们的人工智能技术，该技术融合了多种不同的气象模型。您可以使用GPS坐标或从位置端点获取的place_id来定义查询地点。

place_id.description: Identifier of a place. To obtain the place_id for the location you want, please use Location endpoints. Alternatively, you can specify the location by parameters lat and lon.

lat.description: Latitude in format 12N, 12.3N, 12.3, or 13S, 13.2S, -13.4,Alternatively, you can specify the location by parameter place_id.

lon.description: Longitude in format 12E, 12.3E, 12.3, or 13W, 13.2W, -13.4,Alternatively, you can specify the location by parameter place_id.

language.description: The language the place names. Available languages are: en(English),es(Spanish),fr(French),de(German),pl(Polish),cs(Czech).

units.description: Unit system to be used. The available values are:auto(Select the system automatically, based on the forecast location.),metric(Metric (SI) units (°C, mm/h, m/s, cm, km, hPa)),us(Imperial units (°F, in/h, mph, in, mi, inHg)),uk(Same as metric, except that visibility is in miles and wind speeds are in mph), ca( Same as metric, except that wind speeds are in km/h and pressure is in kPa.)

services.name: 全球日月星象预报服务
services.description: 提供未来30天内指定地点的日出日落、月出月落及月相信息。可通过GPS坐标或位置ID定义查询地点。

place_id.description: Identifier of a place. To obtain the place_id for the location you want, please use Location endpoints. Alternatively, you can specify the location by parameters lat and lon.

lat.description: Latitude in format 12N, 12.3N, 12.3, or 13S, 13.2S, -13.4,Alternatively, you can specify the location by parameter place_id.

lon.description: Longitude in format 12E, 12.3E, 12.3, or 13W, 13.2W, -13.4,Alternatively, you can specify the location by parameter place_id.

timazone.description: Timezone to be used for the date fields. If not specified, local timezone of the forecast location will be used. The format is according to the tzinfo database, so values like Europe/Prague or UTC can be used. Alternatively you may use the value auto in which case the local timezone of the location is used.
